race_meta.race_name: Daily Profit Boosts At betmgm.co.uk Fillies' Novice Stakes

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner city queen was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Izz'nt She Hot with 32.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Forecast distribution correctly predicted City Queen > Always Happy. Win-place accuracy validated.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner City Queen had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -4.1%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
